# Data Governance Act

Jurisdiction: European Union / EEA
Region: EU
Citation: Regulation (EU) 2022/868
Authority: European Union
Source URL: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=CELEX:32022R0868
Topics: third_party_sharing, processor_contracts, cross_border_transfer, accountability
Keywords: Data Governance Act, data intermediation, data altruism, public sector data, reuse, data sharing, 数据共享, 数据中介

## Summary
EU framework for data sharing governance, public-sector data reuse, data intermediation services, and data altruism organisations.

## Key compliance obligations
- Assess conditions for reuse of protected public-sector data.
- Apply neutrality and governance duties for data intermediation services.
- Maintain transparency and registration duties for recognised data altruism organisations.
